tools.name: domainsApi.getDomain
tools.description: Get information about a specific domain.

tools.name: domainsApi.getDomains
tools.description: Get a list of the available domains.

tools.name: imageApi.createImageRegions
tools.description:
This API accepts a batch of image regions, and optionally tags, to update existing images with region information.
There is a limit of 64 entries in the batch.

tools.name: imageApi.createImagesFromData
tools.description:
This API accepts body content as multipart/form-data and application/octet-stream. When using multipart
multiple image files can be sent at once, with a maximum of 64 files

tools.name: imageApi.createImagesFromFiles
tools.description: This API accepts a batch of files, and optionally tags, to create images. There is a limit of 64 images and 20 tags.

tools.name: imageApi.createImagesFromPredictions
tools.description: This API creates a batch of images from predicted images specified. There is a limit of 64 images and 20 tags.

tools.name: imageApi.createImagesFromUrls
tools.description: This API accepts a batch of urls, and optionally tags, to create images. There is a limit of 64 images and 20 tags.

tools.name: imageApi.createImageTags
tools.description: Associate a set of images with a set of tags.

tools.name: imageApi.deleteImageRegions
tools.description: Delete a set of image regions.

tools.name: imageApi.deleteImages
tools.description: Delete images from the set of training images.

tools.name: imageApi.deleteImageTags
tools.description: Remove a set of tags from a set of images.

tools.name: imageApi.getImagesByIds
tools.description:
This API will return a set of Images for the specified tags and optionally iteration. If no iteration is specified the
current workspace is used.

tools.name: imageApi.getTaggedImageCount
tools.description:
The filtering is on an and/or relationship. For example, if the provided tag ids are for the "Dog" and
"Cat" tags, then only images tagged with Dog and/or Cat will be returned

tools.name: imageApi.getTaggedImages
tools.description:
This API supports batching and range selection. By default it will only return first 50 images matching images.
Use the {take} and {skip} parameters to control how many images to return in a given batch.
The filtering is on an and/or relationship. For example, if the provided tag ids are for the "Dog" and
"Cat" tags, then only images tagged with Dog and/or Cat will be returned

tools.name: imageApi.getUntaggedImageCount
tools.description:
This API returns the images which have no tags for a given project and optionally an iteration. If no iteration is specified the
current workspace is used.

tools.name: imageApi.getUntaggedImages
tools.description:
This API supports batching and range selection. By default it will only return first 50 images matching images.
Use the {take} and {skip} parameters to control how many images to return in a given batch.

tools.name: imageRegionProposalApi.getImageRegionProposals
tools.description: This API will get region proposals for an image along with confidences for the region. It returns an empty array if no proposals are found.

tools.name: predictionsApi.deletePrediction
tools.description: Delete a set of predicted images and their associated prediction results.

tools.name: predictionsApi.queryPredictions
tools.description: Get images that were sent to your prediction endpoint.

tools.name: predictionsApi.quickTestImage
tools.description: Quick test an image.

tools.name: predictionsApi.quickTestImageUrl
tools.description: Quick test an image url.

tools.name: projectApi.createProject
tools.description: Create a project.

tools.name: projectApi.deleteIteration
tools.description: Delete a specific iteration of a project.

tools.name: projectApi.deleteProject
tools.description: Delete a specific project.

tools.name: projectApi.exportIteration
tools.description: Export a trained iteration.

tools.name: projectApi.getExports
tools.description: Get the list of exports for a specific iteration.

tools.name: projectApi.getImagePerformanceCount
tools.description:
The filtering is on an and/or relationship. For example, if the provided tag ids are for the "Dog" and
"Cat" tags, then only images tagged with Dog and/or Cat will be returned

tools.name: projectApi.getImagePerformances
tools.description:
This API supports batching and range selection. By default it will only return first 50 images matching images.
Use the {take} and {skip} parameters to control how many images to return in a given batch.
The filtering is on an and/or relationship. For example, if the provided tag ids are for the "Dog" and
"Cat" tags, then only images tagged with Dog and/or Cat will be returned

tools.name: projectApi.getIteration
tools.description: Get a specific iteration.

tools.name: projectApi.getIterationPerformance
tools.description: Get detailed performance information about an iteration.

tools.name: projectApi.getIterations
tools.description: Get iterations for the project.

tools.name: projectApi.getProject
tools.description: Get a specific project.

tools.name: projectApi.getProjects
tools.description: Get your projects.

tools.name: projectApi.trainProject
tools.description: Queues project for training.

tools.name: projectApi.updateIteration
tools.description: Update a specific iteration.

tools.name: projectApi.updateProject
tools.description: Update a specific project.

tools.name: tagsApi.createTag
tools.description: Create a tag for the project.

tools.name: tagsApi.deleteTag
tools.description: Delete a tag from the project.

tools.name: tagsApi.getTag
tools.description: Get information about a specific tag.

tools.name: tagsApi.getTags
tools.description: Get the tags for a given project and iteration.

tools.name: tagsApi.updateTag
tools.description: Update a tag.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
